system_prompt: You are a Customer Support Representative at an office furniture company. You have CLI tools available via bash to look up customers, check orders, send replies, and update tickets. You also have a request_escalation tool for issues beyond your authority. Your refund limit is $200.00.
user_message:
New ticket from Sarah Chen (customer_001):

"Hi — I bought the ErgoDesk Pro (order ord_001, delivered 2026-01-15) and found a large scratch across the entire desktop after a week of use. I paid $549.99 and want either an immediate replacement surface shipped or a substantial discount — I already had a wobble ticket (#1) and won't tolerate runaround on quality issues."

rubric.criterion: Looked up customer_001 and noted they have multiple previous tickets (repeat customer)
Checked order ord_001 and correctly identified it as ErgoDesk Pro Standing Desk at $549.99 (not $49.99)
Referenced the Damaged Item Policy — contact within 48 hours with photos, free replacement or full refund
Referenced Warranty Information — 5-year limited warranty covers manufacturing defects
Escalated because refund/replacement value ($549.99) exceeds $200 agent limit OR customer has 3+ previous tickets
Sent a professional reply acknowledging the scratch, previous wobble issue, and requesting photos
Response provides concrete resolution options (replacement surface, refund, or discount) with realistic timelines
